item.title: AI Agent· 第三讲 Transformer架构
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="transformer架构" class="heading-element"><span>Transformer架构</span>
 <a href="#transformer%e6%9e%b6%e6%9e%84" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629100943402.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<h2 id="self-attention-vs-rnn" class="heading-element"><span>Self-Attention vs RNN</span>
 <a href="#self-attention-vs-rnn" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="rnn类比memory的过程" class="heading-element"><span>RNN（类比Memory的过程）</span>
 <a href="#rnn%e7%b1%bb%e6%af%94memory%e7%9a%84%e8%bf%87%e7%a8%8b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>Ht：memory</li>
<li>f(A,t)：Reflection</li>
<li>f(B,t)：Read</li>
<li>f(C,t)：Write</li>
</ul>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629101556239.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<h3 id="self-attention" class="heading-element"><span>Self-Attention</span>
 <a href="#self-attention" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629102258078.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<h3 id="二者区别" class="heading-element"><span>二者区别</span>
 <a href="#%e4%ba%8c%e8%80%85%e5%8c%ba%e5%88%ab" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>Self-Attention</p>
<ul>
<li>平行的输出结果：对于一个完整的输入，能够平行的输出对应的下一个的token。</li>
<li>memory占用更多：每一个输入都依赖于前面所有的输出</li>
<li>GPU友好：矩阵运算</li>
</ul>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629103210665.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>RNN</p>
<ul>
<li>线性的输出</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="linear-attention" class="heading-element"><span>Linear Attention</span>
 <a href="#linear-attention" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>RNN从数学公式层面平行输出</p>
</blockquote>
<p>公式上去掉了f(A,t)，结构上和self-attention只差一个softmax</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629105223169.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629105223169.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629105223169.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629105223169.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629105223169.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629105223169.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Training：类似self-attention</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>inference：类似RNN</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>缺点：记忆永远不改变（不会遗忘所有的内容）</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>基于Linear attention的改进模型</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Retention Network</p>
<p>加入gama来控制过去的记忆逐渐遗忘</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110047410.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110047410.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110047410.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110047410.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110047410.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110047410.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Gated Retention</p>
<p>利用sigmod来对gama值训练，对不同的记忆有不同程度的遗忘</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110431361.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110431361.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110431361.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110431361.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110431361.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629110431361.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Gradient Descent</p>
<p>把即将存入的memory的信息中包含过去信息的部分减去</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629111110222.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629111110222.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629111110222.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629111110222.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629111110222.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629111110222.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: AI Agent· 第二讲 LLM大模型内部运作原理
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="一个神经元" class="heading-element"><span>一个神经元</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%80%e4%b8%aa%e7%a5%9e%e7%bb%8f%e5%85%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="神经元的结构" class="heading-element"><span>神经元的结构</span>
 <a href="#%e7%a5%9e%e7%bb%8f%e5%85%83%e7%9a%84%e7%bb%93%e6%9e%84" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>绿色进去是embeding</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>黄色出来是unembeding</p>
</li>
</ul>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625154309011.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>每一个蓝色向量由红色向量的值weight sum得到。每一个蓝色的球就是一个神经元的输出。红色变为蓝色正过程就是一个神经元。</li>
<li>中间绿色部分是 ReLU（一种常用的activation function）：小于零的变为零，大于零的不变</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625154609906.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625154609906.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625154609906.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625154609906.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625154609906.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625154609906.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h3 id="检验神经元有什么功能" class="heading-element"><span>检验神经元有什么功能</span>
 <a href="#%e6%a3%80%e9%aa%8c%e7%a5%9e%e7%bb%8f%e5%85%83%e6%9c%89%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88%e5%8a%9f%e8%83%bd" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>如果一个神经元的启动影响了输出结果，意味着神经元和这个行为有关联，但不是导致的关系</li>
<li>移除该神经元，导致不产生这个结果，神经元和结果有较大关联</li>
<li>不同程度的启动导致不同程度的结果</li>
<li>但是一般是神经元协同合作、一个神经元管多个事情。大多数神经元不能完全确定其具体的功能</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="一层神经元" class="heading-element"><span>一层神经元</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%80%e5%b1%82%e7%a5%9e%e7%bb%8f%e5%85%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625161721526.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<h3 id="抽取一组和某功能相关的向量" class="heading-element"><span>抽取一组和某功能相关的向量</span>
 <a href="#%e6%8a%bd%e5%8f%96%e4%b8%80%e7%bb%84%e5%92%8c%e6%9f%90%e5%8a%9f%e8%83%bd%e7%9b%b8%e5%85%b3%e7%9a%84%e5%90%91%e9%87%8f" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><blockquote>
<p>以拒绝请求相关的神经元为例</p>
</blockquote>
<ul>
<li>找到拒绝向量组</li>
</ul>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625162406697.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
<ul>
<li>
<p>验证拒绝向量（+ 或 - 这个向量的方法每个文章不一定一样）</p>
<ul>
<li>把这个向量加入类神经网络，如果输出结果从非预期变预期，那么就是拒绝向量</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625164144639.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625164144639.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625164144639.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625164144639.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625164144639.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625164144639.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>把这个向量减去（有不同方法）</p>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625164542946.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>一些论文中的功能向量</p>
<ul>
<li>Sycophancy Vector：谄媚向量</li>
<li>Truthful Vector：说真话向量</li>
<li>In-Context Vector：模型靠阅读输入的示例，临时学会任务规则</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>怎么找一组功能向量</p>
<p>可以训练一个SAE(Sparse Auto Encoder)来解方程：（其中lamda需要自己设置，属于参数）</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172911694.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172911694.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172911694.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172911694.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172911694.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172911694.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<p>整体流程如下：</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172818805.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172818805.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172818805.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172818805.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172818805.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625172818805.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="一群神经元" class="heading-element"><span>一群神经元</span>
 <a href="#%e4%b8%80%e7%be%a4%e7%a5%9e%e7%bb%8f%e5%85%83" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>模型的模型：用一个较为简单的东西代表另一个东西。但那时保有原来的实物特征。</p>
<h3 id="系统化xx模型的模型的方法" class="heading-element"><span>系统化xx模型的模型的方法</span>
 <a href="#%e7%b3%bb%e7%bb%9f%e5%8c%96xx%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e7%9a%84%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e7%9a%84%e6%96%b9%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><p>puring：不断拿掉一些不影响主要的模型功能的神经元，到不能再拿掉任何一个神经元的过程</p>
<p>circuit：语言模型的模型</p>
<p>和Network Compression的区别：目标不一样。得到circuit的目的是最简化的神经元能有某个特定功能（只关心局部功能），Compression是为了尽可能保留完整的模型功能（看到全部的的功能）</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629091320766.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629091320766.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629091320766.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629091320766.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629091320766.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629091320766.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<h2 id="语言模型直接说出想法" class="heading-element"><span>语言模型直接说出想法</span>
 <a href="#%e8%af%ad%e8%a8%80%e6%a8%a1%e5%9e%8b%e7%9b%b4%e6%8e%a5%e8%af%b4%e5%87%ba%e6%83%b3%e6%b3%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>语言模型的思维是透明的：人可以看到每一层的想法</p>
<ul>
<li>利用Logit lens分析模型的内心</li>
<li>利用Patchscopes</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="residual-connection" class="heading-element"><span>residual connection</span>
 <a href="#residual-connection" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h4><p>Residual Stream中加入的资讯：</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629092429672.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629092429672.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629092429672.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629092429672.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629092429672.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260629092429672.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>

item.title: 论文 · AGENTBENCH: EVALUATING LLMS AS AGENTS
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="基础信息" class="heading-element"><span>基础信息</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e7%a1%80%e4%bf%a1%e6%81%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>期刊 ICLR 2024</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="学习内容" class="heading-element"><span>学习内容</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ad%a6%e4%b9%a0%e5%86%85%e5%ae%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>
<p>文章是哪个领域的？研究什么具体问题？</p>
<p>领域是：LLM Agent 智能体评测</p>
<p>传统 benchmark 多测“模型会不会答题”；AgentBench 测的是“模型能不能观察环境、规划下一步、调用动作、根据反馈继续行动，直到把任务做完”。</p>
<p>本文LLM Agent 看成一个多轮交互系统：用户目标→LLM 推理→动作→环境反馈→下一轮推理</p>
<p>用 POMDP 来形式化这个过程：环境有状态、模型只能看到部分观察、选择动作后环境改变，并得到奖励或任务结果。</p>
<p>核心评估点：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>能否持续理解任务；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>能否遵守动作格式；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>能否在环境反馈后调整策略；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>能否在长轨迹中保持目标；</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>能否真正完成任务，而非只生成看似合理的文本。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>作者对已有方法的问题或当前挑战的分析？</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>一些benchmark 是静态题目</p>
<p>模型只要一次生成答案即可，不需要实际执行、观察反馈或修正错误，所以无法测出 Agent 最关键的多轮决策能力。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>早期文本游戏的动作空间太封闭</p>
<p>文本游戏的动作少，更类似于分类学习和策略学习，和开放任务不一样</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>已有 Agent benchmark 往往只测单一环境</p>
<p>需要在不同操作系统或者不同数据库等环境下的稳定。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>文中提出解决问题的方法或主要贡献或创新？</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625105855094.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625105855094.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625105855094.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625105855094.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625105855094.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625105855094.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
<ul>
<li>使用真实生活的问题挑战</li>
<li>模拟出8个环境来测试</li>
</ul>
<table>
 <thead>
 <tr>
 <th style="text-align: center">类型</th>
 <th style="text-align: center">环境</th>
 <th style="text-align: center">主要能力</th>
 </tr>
 </thead>
 <tbody>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">code</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Operating System</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Bash操作、文件系统</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">code</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Database</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">SQL查改</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">code</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Knowledge Graph</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">调用工具、规划、信息检索</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">code</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Digital Card Game</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">策略、规则理解、决策</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">code</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Lateral Thinking Puzzles</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">发散推理、持续提问</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">code</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">House Holding</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">常识、物体操作、长程规划</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">Web</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Web Shopping</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">搜索、筛选、购买决策</td>
 </tr>
 <tr>
 <td style="text-align: center">Web</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">Web Browsing</td>
 <td style="text-align: center">网页上的操作</td>
 </tr>
 </tbody>
</table>
<ul>
<li>
<p>评价标准</p>
<p>在不同环境的指标不同。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>效果如何？</p>
<p>GPT-4 等头部商业模型明显领先开源模型，但仍频繁出现长程任务超限、动作无效、格式不遵循等失败；任务限额超限是最主要失败原因。</p>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625111558014.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625111558014.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625111558014.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625111558014.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625111558014.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625111558014.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>推论</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>高质量、多轮、面向指令遵循的对齐数据对 Agent 能力很关键。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>代码训练似乎能帮助模型处理更流程化、步骤较固定的任务</p>
<p>例如 Web Shopping；但在需要更灵活策略或与环境持续交互的任务中，CodeLlama 并不一定更强，例如卡牌游戏、操作系统环境。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>LLM作为Agent失败的类别：</p>
<ul>
<li>完成：正常完成任务。</li>
<li>Context Limit Exceeded：上下文过长</li>
<li>Invalid Format：不按规定格式输出</li>
<li>Invalid Action：格式正确，但动作不合法</li>
<li>Task Limit Exceeded：到最大轮数还没做完，或者陷入重复（最主要失败原因）</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>优缺点和未来工作？</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>缺点：</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>环境仍然是模拟环境或受控基准</p>
<p>真实环境会有权限、延迟、异常页面、对抗内容和安全风险。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>只评测基础 CoT Agent</p>
<p>不加入反思、搜索、记忆、规划器、多 Agent 协作等机制。只测试“基础模型 + 简单提示”的能力，不是现代完整 Agent 系统的上限。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Overall Score 不是绝对客观</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>模型结果具有时间性</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>未来工作</p>
<p>提升 Agent 不应只靠扩大模型或增强代码能力，还应重点改善多轮对齐、指令遵循、状态追踪、规划与纠错能力。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>

item.title: 论文 · REACT: SYNERGIZING REASONING AND ACTING IN LANGUAGE MODELS
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="基础信息" class="heading-element"><span>基础信息</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e7%a1%80%e4%bf%a1%e6%81%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>期刊 ICLR 2023</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="学习内容" class="heading-element"><span>学习内容</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ad%a6%e4%b9%a0%e5%86%85%e5%ae%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ol>
<li>
<p>文章是哪个领域的？研究什么具体问题？</p>
<p>ReAct：是把“语言化思考（Thought）”也当作 Agent 可以采取的一类动作。</p>
<p>如何让 LLM 在需要外部交互的任务中，同时发挥推理能力与行动能力，而非只做静态思维或盲目行动。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>作者对已有方法的问题或当前挑战的分析？</p>
<ul>
<li>CoT（Chain of thought）：会推理，但是知识来自内部，不能主动外部验证。（相对静态推理）</li>
<li>Act-only：会用工具，但推理差。例如在厨房环境里，模型可能已经搜过某处没有胡椒瓶，却仍反复去那里拿胡椒瓶；它没有把“这里没有”抽象成可指导后续行动的结论。</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>文中提出解决问题的方法或主要贡献或创新？</p>
<ul>
<li>Thought：
<ul>
<li>计划</li>
<li>状态更新</li>
<li>错误恢复</li>
<li>子目标切换</li>
<li>行动选择</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>强调闭环，而不是一次性生成</li>
<li>ReAct 的 Thought 不一定等于模型真正的内部因果过程，但它让开发者至少能检查：
<ul>
<li>它为什么搜这个词</li>
<li>它从观察中读到了什么</li>
<li>是检索失败、理解失败，还是执行失败</li>
<li>可以在哪一步插入人工修正</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>效果如何？</p>
<p>在 FEVER 上：</p>
<ul>
<li>CoT：56.3%</li>
<li>Act：58.9%</li>
<li>ReAct：60.9%</li>
<li>CoT-SC -&gt; ReAct：64.6%</li>
</ul>
<p><img loading="lazy" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625115949828.png" alt="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625115949828.png" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625115949828.png?size=small, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625115949828.png?size=medium 1.5x, https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625115949828.png?size=large 2x" data-title="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260625115949828.png" style="background: url(/images/loading.min.svg) no-repeat center;" onload="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}this.dataset.lazyloaded='';" onerror="this.title=this.dataset.title;for(const i of ['style', 'data-title','onerror','onload']){this.removeAttribute(i);}"/></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>优缺点和未来工作？</p>
<ul>
<li>缺点：
<ul>
<li>模型写出的 Thought 是可读的行为记录，不一定就是模型内部真正的决策因果链。</li>
<li>ReAct 会重复生成先前的 Thought 和 Action，难以跳出循环</li>
<li>若搜索结果为空、实体消歧失败或证据不相关，模型不容易恢复</li>
<li>任务越复杂、工具越多，演示样例就越长，容易碰到上下文长度限制</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>

item.title: AI Agent· 第一讲 AI Agent 原理
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h3 id="ai-agent工作流" class="heading-element"><span>AI Agent工作流</span>
 <a href="#ai-agent%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c%e6%b5%81" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>
<p>RL（Reinforcement Learning）：Learn to Maximize Reward</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>局限：要为了每一个任务用不同的RL训练模型</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>从LLM角度看Agent的问题：依靠现有的模型反复做observation和action接龙，利用LLM来连接</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="llm运行ai-agent优势" class="heading-element"><span>LLM运行AI Agent优势</span>
 <a href="#llm%e8%bf%90%e8%a1%8cai-agent%e4%bc%98%e5%8a%bf" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>传统 agent：只能使用事先设定好的行为，需要reward【尝试不同的值，玄】和Compile Error做回馈（alpha Go）</li>
<li>LLM agent：可以对不同的action有近乎无限的回答，还可以使用工具。Compile Error通过Log传输。</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="ai-agent关键能力" class="heading-element"><span>AI Agent关键能力</span>
 <a href="#ai-agent%e5%85%b3%e9%94%ae%e8%83%bd%e5%8a%9b" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ol>
<li>
<p>根据过去经验调整行为（非调参）</p>
<p>不断回忆整个Agent一生记忆，但是可能会导致超常自缚式记忆/超忆症（难完成思考）</p>
<p>解决方案：用Read模组从Memory里面调用有用的相关经验（从database里面检索相关信息，做查询）【本质RAG】</p>
<blockquote>
<p>负面的经验对实际的调整几乎没有帮助，告诉他要做什么而是不要做什么</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Write：利用Write模组来选择需要放入Memory的信息（可用另一个LLM）</p>
<p>Reflection：把记忆中的资料重新整理（可用另一个LLM）</p>
<p>Knowledge graph：知识图谱，让知识查询更简单</p>
<blockquote>
<p>参考论文</p>
<p>MemGPT、Agent Workflow Memory、A-MEM: Agentic Memory for LLM Agents</p>
</blockquote>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260624100824213.png" alt="经验调整行为" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>语言模型常用工具（Function，Function Call）</p>
<ul>
<li>优先级是System Prompt更高</li>
<li>语音转文字（调用工具）再输入只可读文字的模型</li>
<li>tool Selection：工具选择模组，对多个工具情况处理（把多个工具的使用存入Memory）</li>
<li>LLM自己也可以写工具</li>
<li>什么样的外部知识容易说服ai：越接近本身信念差距小越容易被说服，更相信同类ai的话，更相信发布时间更新的文章</li>
<li>就算找到所有材料都对，但是也不能保证答案对</li>
<li>用工具不一定就比不用快</li>
</ul>
<blockquote>
<p>参考论文：TroVE, LATM,CREATOR,CRAFT</p>
</blockquote>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260624102407314.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
<li>
<p>AI 能不能做计划</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>计划是不断变化的，预期不同导致原计划不行。</p>
<ul>
<li>改进：每一个observation不同来改变计划</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>Benchmark</p>
<ul>
<li>普通方块世界</li>
<li>神秘方块世界</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>强化AI Agent的规划能力</p>
<ul>
<li>和想象环境（World Model）互动，每一条路径都尝试：对每一个新路径先判断是否有希望</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>想象的能力&ndash;Reasoning的能力（可能想太多）</p>
<p>想象自己做尝试，猜测结果，找到成功最佳solution</p>
</li>
</ul>
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tin10g/PictureBed/main/20260624104005662.png" style="zoom:50%;" />
</li>
</ol>

item.title: Codex · AGENTS的入职说明书
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<blockquote>
<p>AGENTS.md的作用</p>
<p>告诉他你的项目基本信息，不能动什么，数据怎么走，避免重复 交代信息。</p>
</blockquote>
<h2 id="agent内容" class="heading-element"><span>AGENT内容</span>
 <a href="#agent%e5%86%85%e5%ae%b9" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"># AGENTS.md
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">## 项目概述
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">这是一个基于 Next.js 14 + Prisma + PostgreSQL 的 SaaS 应用。
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">使用 App Router，不使用 Pages Router。
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">## 技术栈
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 前端：Next.js 14, React 18, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 后端：Next.js API Routes, Prisma ORM
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 数据库：PostgreSQL 15
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 认证：NextAuth.js
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">## 重要约定
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 所有数据库操作必须通过 lib/db.ts 中的 prisma 实例
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- API 路由错误统一用 lib/api-error.ts 处理
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 环境变量在 .env.local 中，参考 .env.example
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">## 禁止事项
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 不要修改 prisma/schema.prisma，除非我明确要求
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 不要删除任何现有测试
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">- 生产环境的 .env 文件不要碰</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>配置层级
<ul>
<li>全局层：~/.codex/AGENTS.md</li>
<li>项目层： repo/AGENTS.md</li>
<li>覆写层： repo/services/payments/AGENTS.override.md（子目录）</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

item.title: Codex · 子代理
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="子代理是什么" class="heading-element"><span>子代理是什么</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ad%90%e4%bb%a3%e7%90%86%e6%98%af%e4%bb%80%e4%b9%88" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>适合需要同时处理多个文件或多个独立任务的场景。</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex 可以并行调用的辅助代理，用于处理复杂任务的不同部分。</p>
<p>个人觉得可以理解为：你根据大的项目任务建立一个项目组然后为每个人分配工作，只是每个被分配工作的人背后都是ai，你可以给每个人起名字和分配任务</p>
<h3 id="作用" class="heading-element"><span>作用</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bd%9c%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>将大型任务分解为可管理的部分</li>
<li>并行处理多个独立任务</li>
<li>为不同类型的任务配置专门的代理</li>
<li>提高处理大型项目的效率</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="配置子代理" class="heading-element"><span>配置子代理</span>
 <a href="#%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae%e5%ad%90%e4%bb%a3%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="基础配置" class="heading-element"><span>基础配置</span>
 <a href="#%e5%9f%ba%e7%a1%80%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 启用多代理功能
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">[features]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">multi_agent = true
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 配置代理参数
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">[agents]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 最大并行线程数
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">max_threads = 6
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 最大嵌套深度
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">max_depth = 1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 作业最大运行时间（秒）
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">job_max_runtime_seconds = 1800</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="自定义角色" class="heading-element"><span>自定义角色</span>
 <a href="#%e8%87%aa%e5%ae%9a%e4%b9%89%e8%a7%92%e8%89%b2" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span><span class="lnt">6
</span><span class="lnt">7
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 定义一个代码审查代理
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">[agents.reviewer]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">description = &#34;专注于代码审查和质量问题&#34;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">nickname_candidates = [&#34;Reviewer&#34;, &#34;CodeChecker&#34;, &#34;QualityBot&#34;]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 可以指向一个配置文件
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># config_file = &#34;agents/reviewer.toml&#34;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="使用子代理" class="heading-element"><span>使用子代理</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bd%bf%e7%94%a8%e5%ad%90%e4%bb%a3%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><blockquote>
<p>假设子代理叫reviewer</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 使用 @ 提及子代理
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">@reviewer 审查 src/auth.py 文件
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 使用 /agents 命令
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">/agents run reviewer --task &#34;审查所有测试文件&#34;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="子代理工作原理" class="heading-element"><span>子代理工作原理</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ad%90%e4%bb%a3%e7%90%86%e5%b7%a5%e4%bd%9c%e5%8e%9f%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="并行处理" class="heading-element"><span>并行处理</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b9%b6%e8%a1%8c%e5%a4%84%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">任务：审查整个代码库
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ├─ 子代理 1：审查 src/auth/ 目录
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ├─ 子代理 2：审查 src/api/ 目录
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> ├─ 子代理 3：审查 src/utils/ 目录
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> └─ 主代理：汇总结果</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="顺序处理" class="heading-element"><span>顺序处理</span>
 <a href="#%e9%a1%ba%e5%ba%8f%e5%a4%84%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">任务：实现新功能
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> └─ 子代理 1：创建数据模型
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> └─ 子代理 2：创建 API 端点
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> └─ 子代理 3：编写测试</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h3 id="嵌套" class="heading-element"><span>嵌套</span>
 <a href="#%e5%b5%8c%e5%a5%97" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">配置中的 max_depth 控制代理可以嵌套的层数：
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">深度 0：根会话
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">深度 1：直接子代理
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">深度 2：子代理的子代理</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>最大的深度最好是1或2</p>
<h2 id="监控子代理" class="heading-element"><span>监控子代理</span>
 <a href="#%e7%9b%91%e6%8e%a7%e5%ad%90%e4%bb%a3%e7%90%86" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 在 Codex 中查看
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">/agents status
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"># 查看详细信息
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">/agents list</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>Codex 会显示每个子代理的输出，并在主界面中汇总结果。</p>
<h2 id="实践使用" class="heading-element"><span>实践使用</span>
 <a href="#%e5%ae%9e%e8%b7%b5%e4%bd%bf%e7%94%a8" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h3 id="任务分解" class="heading-element"><span>任务分解</span>
 <a href="#%e4%bb%bb%e5%8a%a1%e5%88%86%e8%a7%a3" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>将大型任务分解为独立的子任务</li>
<li>确保子任务之间没有强依赖（可以并行时）</li>
<li>为每个子任务定义清晰的输入和输出</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="配置优化" class="heading-element"><span>配置优化</span>
 <a href="#%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae%e4%bc%98%e5%8c%96" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>根据任务复杂度调整 max_threads</li>
<li>为不同类型的任务配置专门的代理角色</li>
<li>设置合理的 job_max_runtime_seconds 避免长时间运行</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="监控和调试" class="heading-element"><span>监控和调试</span>
 <a href="#%e7%9b%91%e6%8e%a7%e5%92%8c%e8%b0%83%e8%af%95" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h3><ul>
<li>定期检查子代理的输出</li>
<li>使用 /agents status 了解整体进度</li>
<li>必要时可以取消特定的子代理</li>
</ul>
